title: Things You Can Tell Just by Looking at Her
tagline: Men have their will. Women have their way.
overview: In California, a group of women struggle with personal problems as their paths intertwine in unexpected ways. Dr. Elaine Keener, the sole caretaker for her aging mother, turns to tarot card reader Christine for spiritual aid. Christine grapples with her own angst due to her lover's debilitating illness. Meanwhile, a bank manager deals with an unwanted pregnancy, two sisters pursue romantic interests and a housewife gets back into the dating game.

cast.name: Glenn Close
cast.character: Dr. Elaine Keener (segments "This is Dr. Keener" and "Fantasies about Rebecca")

cast.name: Calista Flockhart
cast.character: Christine Taylor (segments "Goodnight Lilly, Goodnight Christine" and "This is Dr. Keener")

cast.name: Kathy Baker
cast.character: Rose (segments "Someone For Rose" and "Fantasies about Rebecca")

cast.name: Amy Brenneman
cast.character: Detective Kathy Faber (segment "Love Waits For Kathy")

cast.name: Matt Craven
cast.character: Walter (segments "Fantasies About Rebecca" and "Love Waits For Kathy")
